category_sources: source_facts.description says roxctl is the CLI for StackRox, now Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives roxctl; official Red Hat docs use the roxctl command name.
docs_sources: Official Red Hat documentation provides a dedicated roxctl CLI guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/stackrox/stackrox, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies StackRox; official Red Hat roxctl docs identify Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security for Kubernetes; current_curation.tags includes cli.
